titles.text: Candy Land / Chutes & Ladders / Original Memory Game

descriptions.text: This Hasbro board game compilation features the three board games of the same name. Each game gives the player the option to have each participant either be played by a person or the computer itself. "Candy Land" has participants try to navigate the location stated in the title to meet King Kandy. "Chutes & Ladders" involves spinning a six-space wheel to progress through the 10 x 10 space board. The first to reach space 100 wins the game. "Original Memory Game" plays the same as the card-matching game of concentration. The goal is to have the most points if competing with other players, or to find all matches if playing independently.
